query: Use datocms-setup-webhooks to add a declarative webhook config, a sync helper, and a local authenticated DatoCMS webhook receiver.
Please run datocms-setup-webhooks in this Next.js repo. I want a reusable DatoCMS webhook sync script plus a basic /api/datocms/webhook endpoint.
Set up DatoCMS webhook management for this Astro site with env placeholders and a receiver stub.
Write a CMA script that creates a webhook when records are published.
Set up DatoCMS build triggers for Vercel.
Set up DatoCMS cache invalidation webhooks for my Next.js project.
